name: Codex Pet Collection
description: A community-friendly collection of installable Codex pets.

pets.description: A Codex pet inspired by Klee from Genshin Impact; hover/jumping row uses a waving loop.
A chibi desktop pet inspired by Albedo from Overlord, with black wings, ivory horns, and a white gold-trimmed dress.
An original anime Codex pet: Aira Xinghui, the star-dream weaver and guardian bridging the astral realm and the human world.

A compact anime chibi Codex pet with long blonde twin tails, blue-violet eyes, red hair ribbons, a serious stubborn expression, a red-and-white patterned top, navy shorts, pink-and-black striped thigh socks, and brown boots.
